title: In-Game Player Input & Control

actors.name: DesktopPlayer
actors.description: Player using keyboard + mouse (DesktopInput). Inherits all InputHandler use-cases.

actors.name: MobilePlayer
actors.description: Player using touchscreen gestures (MobileInput implements GestureListener).

actors.name: Server
actors.description: Validates and executes @Remote actions forwarded by the client. Acts as trust boundary.
actors.source: Vars.net / Call.* remote methods in InputHandler

use_cases.name: Move Unit
use_cases.description: Player moves their unit using directional input.
use_cases.impl: updateMovement(Unit unit) in DesktopInput/MobileInput — reads Binding.moveX/moveY axes, sets unit velocity. Mobile also uses edge-pan and gesture vector.

use_cases.name: Shoot / Attack
use_cases.description: Player fires unit weapons at target.
use_cases.impl: DesktopInput: shouldShoot flag set when mouse not over UI + not locked. MobileInput: manualShooting flag + checkTargets(x,y) selects closest enemy or building. PlayerComp.afterSync() calls unit.controlWeapons(shooting, shooting).

use_cases.name: Place Block
use_cases.description: Player selects a block and places it on valid tile.
use_cases.impl: InputHandler: block != null & mode == placing. MobileInput.tap(): selectPlans.add(new BuildPlan(...)). DesktopInput uses pollInputPlayer for line/area placement. unit.plans queue is synced to server.

use_cases.name: Break Block
use_cases.description: Player queues removal of an existing building.
use_cases.impl: mode == breaking; MobileInput.tap(): selectPlans.add(new BuildPlan(x,y) with no block). Call.deletePlans() sends int[] positions to server.

use_cases.name: Rotate Block
use_cases.description: Player rotates a placed or planned building.
use_cases.impl: @Remote InputHandler.rotateBlock(Player, Building, boolean direction). Server: validates canInteract + allowAction(rotate). Fires BuildRotateEvent.

use_cases.name: Configure Tile
use_cases.description: Player opens configuration UI for a block (e.g. sorter, router).
use_cases.impl: tileTapped(Building): checks build.block.configurable & build.interactable(). Shows config.showConfig(build). @Remote tileConfig(Player, Building, Object value) calls build.configured(unit, value). Fires ConfigEvent.

use_cases.name: Transfer Item to Building
use_cases.description: Player carries items and deposits them into an adjacent building.
use_cases.impl: @Remote InputHandler.transferItemTo(Unit, Item, int amount, x, y, Building): unit.stack.amount decremented, build.handleStack(item, amount, unit) called. Uses itemDepositCooldown rate limit. createItemTransfer() fires Fx.itemTransfer visual.

use_cases.name: Drop Item
use_cases.description: Player drops the item their unit is carrying on the ground.
use_cases.impl: @Remote InputHandler.dropItem(Player, float angle). unit.clearItem() called server-side. Triggered by tryTapPlayer() when player.unit().stack.amount > 0 and within playerSelectRange.

use_cases.name: Mine Tile
use_cases.description: Player unit begins mining an ore tile.
use_cases.impl: InputHandler.tryBeginMine(Tile): player.unit().mineTile = tile. canMine() checks unit.validMine(tile) + acceptsItem(). tryStopMine() sets mineTile = null.

use_cases.name: Control Unit (Possess)
use_cases.description: Player takes direct control of an AI unit.
use_cases.impl: Desktop: Ctrl+click → Call.unitControl(player, unit). Mobile: double-tap on unitTapped → Call.unitControl(). @Remote InputHandler.unitControl(): unit must be AI, same team, not dead, playerControllable(). Sets player.unit(unit) via PlayerComp.unit(). Fires UnitControlEvent.

use_cases.name: Control Building
use_cases.description: Player enters a controllable building (e.g. turret, reconstructor).
use_cases.impl: @Remote InputHandler.buildingControlSelect(Player, Building): build.canControlSelect(player.unit()) → build.onControlSelect(unit). Mobile: double-tap buildingTapped. Desktop: Ctrl+click selectedControlBuild().

use_cases.name: Respawn
use_cases.description: Player returns to core unit, clearing current unit control.
use_cases.impl: Desktop: Binding.respawn key → Call.unitClear(player). @Remote unitClear: clears player unit. PlayerComp.update(): deathTimer triggers core.requestSpawn(). Auto-respawn: controlledType re-finds nearest unit and Call.unitControl().

use_cases.name: Command Units (RTS Mode)
use_cases.description: Player selects and issues move/attack commands to commandable units.
use_cases.impl: commandMode toggle (Binding.commandMode). tapCommandUnit() / commandTap(x,y). @Remote commandUnits(Player, int[] unitIds, buildTarget, unitTarget, posTarget, queueCommand, finalBatch): sets CommandAI.commandTarget/commandPosition. Formations assigned in finalBatch. Mobile: queueCommandMode flag.

use_cases.name: Select Unit Control Group
use_cases.description: Desktop player saves/recalls groups of units to numbered hotkeys.
use_cases.impl: controlGroupBindings[0..9] (Binding.blockSelect01-10). Creating: group.addAll(selectedUnits.mapInt(u->u.id)). Recall: selectedUnits rebuilt from group IDs. Double-tap centers camera on group centroid.

use_cases.name: Select All Units
use_cases.description: Desktop player selects all commandable units of team, optionally screen-filtered.
use_cases.impl: Binding.selectAllUnits / selectAllUnitTransport / selectAllUnitFactories. Uses selectedCommandUnits(camera.bounds) for screen-filter variant.

use_cases.name: Pick Up Payload
use_cases.description: Payload-capable unit picks up another unit or block payload.
use_cases.impl: InputHandler.tryPickupPayload(): Units.closest for AI unit → Call.requestUnitPayload(); else world.buildWorld → Call.requestBuildPayload(). Unit must implement Payloadc.

use_cases.name: Drop Payload
use_cases.description: Payload-capable unit drops its carried payload.
use_cases.impl: InputHandler.tryDropPayload(): Call.requestDropPayload(player, x, y). Mobile: payloadTarget tracks destination position/unit/building.

use_cases.name: Ping Location
use_cases.description: Player marks a map position to alert teammates.
use_cases.impl: @Remote pingLocation(Player, float x, float y, String text). Desktop: Binding.ping key (Ctrl for text). Mobile: triple-tap. Server validates allowAction(pingLocation). PlayerComp.drawPing() renders for same-team players.

use_cases.name: Pan / Zoom Camera
use_cases.description: Player navigates the world view.
use_cases.impl: Desktop: mouse-hold pan (Binding.pan), scroll-wheel zoom (renderer.scaleCamera), WASD camera when dead/paused/detached. Mobile: GestureListener.pan() / zoom() / pinch(). panCamera(Vec2) forces camera position.

use_cases.name: Tap Tile (General Interaction)
use_cases.description: Player taps/clicks a tile, triggering contextual action.
use_cases.impl: @Remote tileTap(Player, Tile) fires TapEvent. tileTapped(Building): shows config, inventory (inv.showFor(build)), or calls build.tapped(). Decision tree: configure > inventory > tap event.

use_cases.name: Boost Unit
use_cases.description: Player activates unit boost/flight.
use_cases.impl: PlayerComp: @SyncLocal boolean boosting. unit.type.canBoost → elevation lerped in PlayerComp.update(). Binding.boost key in updateMovement.

use_cases.name: Repair Derelict Building
use_cases.description: Player queues repair of a Team.derelict building.
use_cases.impl: InputHandler.tryRepairDerelict(Tile): canRepairDerelict() checks tile.build.team == Team.derelict + block.unlockedNowHost() + Build.validPlace(). Adds BuildPlan with existing config.

include_extend_relationships: UC03 <<include>> UC20 (block placement checked inside tap flow)
UC04 <<include>> UC20 (break mode checked inside tap flow)
UC09 <<extend>> UC20 (mine begins when no other tap action consumed)
UC10 <<extend>> UC13 (possess single unit available in command mode too)
UC16 <<extend>> UC10 (payload pickup is a specialized unit action)
UC17 <<extend>> UC10 (payload drop is a specialized unit action)
key_class_relationships: InputHandler uses Call (static @Remote dispatch to Server)
important_notes: All server-modifying actions go through @Remote annotated static methods in InputHandler (called via Call.*); server validates permissions via netServer.admins.allowAction().
PlayerComp.update() handles auto-respawn: when dead, best core spawns unit; controlledType auto-finds nearest same-type unit.
PlayerComp.afterSync() fixes unit rubber-banding using justSwitchFrom/justSwitchTo guards.
InputHandler.inputLocks: locked() returns true during renderer cutscenes or logicCutscene, blocking all player input.
DesktopInput: commandMode toggled by Binding.commandMode; selectUnitsRect() on mouseRelease draws selection rectangle.
MobileInput: double-tap controls unit; single-tap + mode decides place/break/mine; manualShooting toggled by UI button.
playerSelectRange = mobile ? 17f : 11f for item deposit targeting.
RouterBuild not found as a dedicated file; likely a generated inner class — not present as a separate source.
